RT @ManCity: KICK-OFF | Let's go, City!!! 🩵

RT @ManCity: I CAN'T KEEP UP!!!
🩵 3-1 🚜 #ManCity https://t.co/YLayT0MMcu

RT @TheHomerHour: The best 60-minutes of your Monday starts right now with @espnhomer and @BBulaga on @ESPNMilwaukee and @ESPNbd!
5:15P -…

RT @NFL: A duel between @AaronRodgers12 and @DrewBrees started 2011 #NFLKickoff in epic fashion 🔥
📺: #Kickoff2024 – Thursday Sep. 5, 8pm E…

Just over a week away from week 1 for the GBP & @espnhomer & I want to hear from you on @TheHomerHour about what you’re looking forward to , nervous about or any feelings regarding week 1 vs Philly. Catch us on @ESPNMilwaukee and we want to hear from you ! 800.990.3776
#B60MOYD
RT @espnhomer: Yes yes yes. Call the Doctor of football. If you don’t have questions. You have no interest in the Packers 1800-990-3776
RT @ESPNMilwaukee: 8 Days Until The 2024 Green Bay Packers Season + Bryan Bulaga's Homer Hour @BBulaga @espnhomer https://t.co/sclTXV7UKU

RT @ManCity: Ready to go again! 😤
#ManCity | @Gatorade https://t.co/EdlSsPTRoZ

RT @alex_strouf: Get right game!

RT @jasonjwilde: What kind of @WildeAndTausch teammate is our guy @BBulaga? He's battening down the hatches for #HurricanMilton and STILL j…

A @TheHomerHour Victory Monday edition coming up at the top of the hour on @ESPNMilwaukee . @espnhomer & I will be talking about that dominate win over the Cardinals yesterday and how good the GBP looked. Can’t wait! Tune in!
#B60MOYL
